source_old_req: The acc_process_emv2 process component shall enforce that each of the input data ports acc1_input, acc2_input, acc3_input, acc4_input, acc5_input, and acc6_input receives data that satisfies the valid communication envelope defined at system integration. The acc_process_emv2.impl implementation layer shall specify connection constraints that accurately describe the data transmission relationships between the refined threads acc1 through acc6 and their respective input ports. Additionally, the implementation shall include guarantee statements ensuring that the external data outputs of the process remain consistent with the internal component outputs, and that input events are not incorrectly forwarded within the process.
natural_requirement: The acc_process_emv2 component shall define the implementation-level signal routing for acc_process_emv2.impl. In the implementation layer, acc_process_emv2.impl shall route signal flow from acc1_input to acc1.acc1_input through C21 and signal flow from acc2_input to acc2.acc2_input through C22.

requirement_items.text: The acc_process_emv2.impl implementation shall route the signal flow from acc1_input to acc1.acc1_input through connection C21.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The acc_process_emv2.impl implementation shall declare connection C21 from acc1_input to acc1.acc1_input.

requirement_items.text: The acc_process_emv2.impl implementation shall route the signal flow from acc2_input to acc2.acc2_input through connection C22.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The acc_process_emv2.impl implementation shall declare connection C22 from acc2_input to acc2.acc2_input.

quality_policy.traceable: Every item has trace_refs and expected_check metadata tied to AADL facts.
quality_policy.principle: Every generated sentence must name an explicit property assignment or structural connection; ordinary feature declarations are not used as rebuilt requirements.

natural_requirement_before_behavior_styl: The acc_process_emv2.impl implementation shall declare connection C21 from acc1_input to acc1.acc1_input. The acc_process_emv2.impl implementation shall declare connection C22 from acc2_input to acc2.acc2_input.

behavior_style_policy.basis: front-110 AGREE-derived requirements favor implementable behavior, constants, assumptions, guarantees, routing, and bounded properties.
behavior_style_policy.rule: Do not describe unsupported validity/legal-boundary semantics unless the AADL model exposes variables, values, or properties that can implement them.

natural_requirement_before_paragraph_rew: The acc_process_emv2.impl implementation shall route the signal flow from acc1_input to acc1.acc1_input through connection C21. The acc_process_emv2.impl implementation shall route the signal flow from acc2_input to acc2.acc2_input through connection C22.

paragraph_style_policy.rule: Req.txt is written as a natural-language requirement paragraph; per-item traceability stays in requirement_items.
paragraph_style_policy.basis: Front-110 AGREE-derived requirements generally combine function, assumptions, guarantees, and implementation notes into 1-4 sentence paragraphs.
